description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image and caches the vendor/ruby directory. Include a global before_script that runs ruby -v, installs bundler without documentation, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor. Define a sast job (default stage) that allows failure, overrides the image to docker:stable, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, uses the docker:stable-dind service, and executes: export SP_VERSION=$(echo \"$CI_SERVER_VERSION\" | sed 's/^\\([0-9]*\\)\\.\\([0-9]*\\).*/\\1-\\2-stable/') ; docker run --env SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL=\"${SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL:-3}\" --volume \"$PWD:/code\" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \"registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/sast:$SP_VERSION\" /app/bin/run /code. Collect gl-sast-report.json as an artifact.
